attributes.title: [Ticura] High-risk indicators (last 24h)
attributes.description: All Ticura indicators with severity >= 70 modified in the last 24 hours, excluding ones that have already aged out. Ranked by severity.

kibanaSavedObjectMeta.searchSourceJSON: {"filter": [], "query": {"language": "kuery", "query": "event.module:\"ti_ticura\" and event.severity >= 70 and labels.is_ioc_transform_source:false and threat.indicator.modified_at >= now-24h"}, "indexRefName": "kibanaSavedObjectMeta.searchSourceJSON.index"}
